texto: A good starts with breakfast; no matter what I'm going through, a good breakfast with friends, family, or tribe helo me and others start the day right and better.a professional practice I follow as retaught to me by a mentor who was a 3 star general when he held the meeting until i and c others had a full breakfast. Good leadrrship and a lesson with kindness.
explicacao: Citação de Diana Kanecki sobre temas ligados a amizade. “A good starts with breakfast; no matter what I'm going through, a good breakfast with friends, fa…” articula amizade, family, vida em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e vida.
